beyondWork.title: Beyond Work
beyondWork.openLinkAria: Open the Beyond Work gallery page
beyondWork.contentMarkdown: I like reading [non-fiction](https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/49705608-pranshu-malviya), [sketching](/en/beyond-work/?g=sketches), [hiking](/en/beyond-work/?g=hiking), and [travelling](/en/beyond-work/?g=travel) - visited four of the seven [wonders](/en/beyond-work/?g=wonders) so far.

sections.contactDescription: Want to chat? Feel free to reach out

galleryPage.title: Beyond Work
galleryPage.searchFiltered: Showing photos that match your search

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.description: This site is a static portfolio. There are no accounts, logins, or forms that store submissions on the site itself.
items: Hosting: The site is served with GitHub Pages. GitHub may process standard server and access logs (for example IP address, request metadata, and timestamps) as described in GitHub’s documentation and privacy statement.
Browser storage: The light/dark theme preference is stored locally in your browser (localStorage via next-themes) and is not sent to a server I operate.

Optional analytics: If this deployment is built with Google Tag Manager enabled (NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_ID), Google may collect usage data under Google’s policies. That configuration is optional and not required to view the site.
External content: Pages may link to or load images from other domains (for example a photo CDN or third-party sites). Those services apply their own privacy practices when you request their content.
informationWeCollect.note: If you email me directly, you choose what you include; that correspondence is handled like normal email, not through this repository.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.description: There is no first-party database on this static site. Processing is limited to what is needed to display the pages and what hosting or optional analytics providers do automatically.
items: To deliver HTML, assets, and linked resources when you visit.
To remember your theme preference in your browser.
If analytics are enabled in the deployment, to understand aggregate traffic (via Google Tag Manager / tools configured there).

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: GitHub hosts the site and may process technical data as part of that service. If Google Tag Manager is enabled for a given build, Google may process analytics data under its terms. I do not sell personal data. When you follow links to other websites, their policies govern those sites.

cookies.title: Cookies and similar technologies
cookies.description: This site does not set first-party cookies for authentication. Theme preference uses local storage in your browser. If Google Tag Manager is enabled, third-party cookies or similar technologies may be used as described in Google’s documentation. You can use browser settings to limit cookies and storage.

dataRetention.title: Retention
dataRetention.description: I do not operate a server-side profile for visitors on this static site. Hosting and analytics providers retain data according to their own policies and your browser controls local storage for theme.

yourRights.title: Your choices and rights
yourRights.description: Depending on where you live, privacy laws may give you rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict certain processing of personal data held by companies that process data about you (for example GitHub or Google). This site does not give me a visitor list from static hosting; for requests related to those services, use the processes they provide.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For questions about this policy, contact me via the information on the main page.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.description: By accessing this website, you agree to these terms.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.description: Content is provided for personal, non-commercial viewing.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Materials are provided as-is without warranties.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.description: I am not liable for damages arising from use of this website.

accuracyOfMaterials.title: Accuracy
accuracyOfMaterials.description: Content may contain errors and is subject to change without notice.

links.title: Links
links.description: External links are not endorsed and are used at your own risk. Third-party sites have their own terms and privacy policies.

modifications.title: Modifications
modifications.description: These terms may be revised at any time.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For questions, contact me via the information on the main page.
